title: Deliciously Dense Filipino Chicken Adobo
description: A traditional Filipino dish made with chicken, turmeric powder, and confit tomatoes, cooked in an earthenware bowl, this adobo is a hearty and flavorful meal, ayurvedic sattvic friendly.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the earthenware bowl over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the bowl and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the confit tomatoes and apple cider vinegar to the bowl and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Serve the adobo hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
